engine_night_kill: The silence of the savannah was shattered. When dawn broke, the Herd found only scattered remnants of {0}. The Apex had claimed another victim in the shadows.
A trail of blood led to the dark thicket. The predators feasted well tonight, and {0} was their chosen prey.
The wind carried the scent of death. {0} fought bravely, but the sheer strength of the Apex left nothing but torn fur and silence.
Morning dew mixed with crimson. {0} was ambushed by the Apex, becoming nothing more than a memory to the Herd.
The roaring echoed through the night. By sunrise, the Herd realized {0} had been violently hunted down.
engine_night_witch_kill: 🧪 A toxic mist drifted from the Rabbit Witch's burrow. {0} inhaled the deadly concoction and collapsed into the earth, lifeless.
🧪 The herbs were mixed with lethal intent. {0} consumed the tainted roots and fell to a venomous demise.
🧪 A dark brew spilled into the watering hole. {0} took a fatal drink, their heart stopping before the moon could set.
🧪 The Rabbit Witch chose malice tonight. {0} was found stiff and lifeless, choked by the cursed potion.
engine_night_protect: 🛡️ The predators circled {1}, ready to strike, but {0} burst from the undergrowth with a fierce counterattack, driving the danger away!
🛡️ Fangs were bared at {1}, but {0} stood their ground, roaring in defiance and protecting their herd mate from certain death.
🛡️ The shadows lunged at {1}, but {0} charged forward, shielding them with their own body until the attacker retreated into the darkness.
🛡️ A deadly ambush awaited {1}, but {0} sensed the danger. A clash of claws and horns echoed, and {1} lived to see another dawn.
engine_night_investigate: 🔍 {0} stalked quietly through the tall grass, watching {1}'s nocturnal movements. The scent revealed their true nature: {2}
🔍 Hiding in the branches, {0} kept a close eye on {1}. The truth of the wild cannot be hidden. Result: {2}
🔍 {0} tracked the paw prints of {1} deep into the territory. The tracks told a clear story. Result: {2}
🔍 Under the pale moonlight, {0} observed {1}'s secret habits. The conclusion was undeniable. Result: {2}
engine_night_compare: ⚖️ {0} carefully studied the hunting grounds of {1} and {2}. Do they share the same bloodline? {3}
⚖️ {0} watched from afar as {1} and {2} interacted by the watering hole. Are they of the same faction? {3}
⚖️ {0} examined the scent trails left by {1} and {2}. Do they run with the same pack? {3}
engine_day_lynch: 🗳️ The Herd turned against {0}. With unified bellows and stomping hooves, they drove {0} out into the harsh wilderness to perish.
🗳️ Suspicion tore the animals apart. The collective wrath fell upon {0}, who was chased away from the sanctuary forever.
🗳️ The council of the wild made its choice. {0} was exiled from the watering hole, left to face the unforgiving elements alone.
🗳️ The stamping of hooves grew deafening. The Herd's judgment was final, and {0} was aggressively banished from the territory.
engine_day_possum_win: 🎭 The Herd believed they had successfully exiled the threat. But {0} suddenly rose, shaking off the dust. The Possum had played dead and outsmarted them all! The Possum wins!
🎭 As the Herd turned their backs, a mocking chatter filled the air. {0} had masterfully played dead! The Possum tricked the entire wild and claims victory!
🎭 The judgment seemed final, until {0} opened their eyes with a cunning glint. The Possum's trickery succeeded! The Herd is left in stunned silence as the Possum takes the win!
engine_retaliate_kill: 💀 🦏 Even as {0} was brought down, their primal instincts flared. In a final, desperate charge, {0} gored {1}, dragging their killer to the grave with them!
💀 🦏 With their last ounce of strength, {0} struck back with devastating force. {1} was caught in the retaliation, and both beasts fell together.
💀 🦏 A hunter never dies without a fight. As {0} collapsed, a fatal blow was dealt to {1}, ensuring mutual destruction.
engine_tie_vote: ⚖️ The roars and bleats canceled each other out. The Herd could not reach a consensus, and no one was banished today.
⚖️ The animals stood in a tense standoff, but the sun began to set before a decision was made. The territory remains unchanged.
⚖️ Divided and unsure, the Herd dispersed. The vote tied, leaving the creeping dread to linger for another night.
engine_night_infect_success_dm: 🩸 You bit {0}! If they don't die by tomorrow, they'll become a Lion and join your gang.
engine_night_infect_failed_dm: ❌ You tried to bite {0}, but your teeth bounced off and the infection failed.
engine_night_bitten_dm: 🩸 The Alpha Lion took a chunk out of you! Tomorrow night, you'll turn into a Lion with them.
engine_night_infect: 🩸 {0} was ambushed in the dark, but instead of death, a dark infection took hold. By morning, {0} stood tall with the Apex, forever transformed.
🩸 A vicious bite changed {0}'s destiny. The wild corruption spread through their veins, turning them into a roaring Lion of the Apex.
🩸 The Alpha's teeth sank into {0}. They did not perish, but their loyalty shifted. The Herd has lost one, and the Apex has grown stronger.
engine_night_dominate_success: 🌀 The mesmerizing gaze of the Serpent locked onto {0}. Their will was stripped away, turning them into an obedient thrall to the slithering master.
🌀 {0} stared into the hypnotic eyes lurking in the branches. Now, they wander mindlessly, fully controlled by the Serpent's silent commands.
🌀 The Serpent's venomous influence corrupted {0}'s mind. They are now nothing more than a puppet bound to the Serpent's will.
engine_night_dominate_fail: 🚫 The Serpent attempted to entrance {1}, but their strong primal instinct broke the spell. {1} walked away unaffected.
🚫 The hypnotic stare of the Serpent met fierce resistance in {1}'s eyes. The mind-control was completely shattered.
🚫 The Serpent coiled and hissed, but {1}'s will was unbending. The domination attempt failed in the dark.
engine_night_proxy_kill: 🐍 The Serpent silently commanded its mind-controlled thrall to strike. {1} was murdered in their sleep by a familiar face!
🐍 Bound by hypnotic chains, the thrall was forced to attack {1}. The Serpent claims another life without exposing its own fangs.
🐍 Against their own will, the Serpent's puppet lunged at {1}. The brutal proxy assassination was a success.
engine_investigate_serpent_death: 👁️ {0} tracked a strange slithering sound too far into the deep jungle. They met the terrifying gaze of the Serpent and perished instantly from the sheer horror.
👁️ Delving too deep into the Serpent's lair, {0} uncovered a dark secret. The shock of the mesmerizing eyes caused their heart to stop completely.
👁️ {0}'s investigation led them straight into the Serpent's coils. A single, paralyzing look was enough to end their life on the spot.
engine_serpent_death_cascade: 💀 💥 As the Serpent was struck down, the hypnotic bond violently snapped. The mental shockwave instantly killed its controlled thrall, {0}!
💀 💥 The death of the Serpent echoed through the mind of its servant. {0} collapsed in agony, their brain unable to survive the severing of the tie.
💀 💥 With the master slayed, the puppet falls. {0} died instantly as the dark magic connecting them to the Serpent shattered.
engine_night_poisoned: 🐍 A sharp sting awakened {0} in the night. Venom now courses through their veins. They have exactly two nights to live unless an antidote is found.
🐍 Dark poison seeps into {0}'s blood. A fatal countdown has begun—without intervention, they will succumb to the venom in two nights.
🐍 {0} feels a cold sickness spreading from a bite mark. The lethal poison gives them only two more nights in the wild.
engine_night_poison_death: ☠️ The venom finally reached {0}'s heart. They collapsed by the riverbank, breathing their last breath.
☠️ Time ran out for {0}. The slow poison fully consumed them, leaving their lifeless body in the tall grass.
☠️ With no cure in sight, {0} succumbed to the toxic bite. The savannah reclaims another fallen beast.
engine_night_poison_cured: 💚 The Rabbit Witch delivered a miraculous healing draught! The venom in {0}'s veins dissolved, sparing their life.
💚 Just as the darkness closed in, a glowing potion washed the poison away. {0} is fully cured and ready to survive another day.
💚 The deadly toxins were purged from {0}'s system thanks to a magical intervention. They live to see the sunrise.
engine_night_ghostly_protect: 👻 A spectral howl filled the night. The Ghostly Dog manifested from the afterlife, throwing itself between {0} and a lethal attack!
👻 An ethereal barrier shielded {0} from the predator's claws. The loyal spirit of the Ghostly Dog still guards the Herd from beyond the grave.
👻 The attacker's fangs found only cold mist. The Ghostly Dog successfully protected {0} under the moonlight.
engine_night_ghostly_loss: ⚠️ The Ghostly Dog made a grave error, protecting a dark force of the wild. As punishment, its spiritual essence vanished, leaving it powerless forever.
⚠️ Shielding a predator has broken the sacred laws of the ancestors. The Ghostly Dog's ethereal powers have been permanently revoked.
⚠️ The spirit was corrupted by guarding the wrong soul. The Ghostly Dog has lost its connection to the afterlife.
engine_night_chemist_gamble_self: 🐸 A catastrophic explosion rocked the swamp! The Chemist Toad miscalculated the brew. {0}'s scorched remains were found floating among shattered glass.
🐸 The toxic fumes overwhelmed the alchemist. {0} accidentally ingested their own deadly mixture and perished in agony.
🐸 A gamble went terribly wrong in the Toad's laboratory. {0} was consumed by the volatile chemicals they sought to master.
engine_night_chemist_gamble_target: 🐸 A strange, bubbly fluid was left near {1}'s den. Unknowingly drinking the Toad's fatal mixture, {1} succumbed to the volatile poison.
🐸 The Chemist Toad's dark gamble paid off. {1} was found lifeless, their skin stained with the colorful toxins of the swamp.
🐸 A lethal chemical reaction ended {1}'s life overnight. The Chemist Toad successfully delivered the fatal dose.
engine_night_cursed_infected: 🦁 The Apex descended upon {0}, aiming to kill. But the attack triggered an ancient curse! {0} did not die, but mutated into a vicious Lion, joining the predators!
🦁 Claws slashed at {0}, but their blood ran dark with the curse. They survived the assault and transformed, unleashing a fearsome roar alongside the Apex.
🦁 An attempted hunt ended in a dark awakening. {0}'s curse broke, twisting them into an Apex predator. The Herd has lost them forever.
night_announce: Night has fallen. Everyone go to sleep and hope you don't get eaten. Night players: check your DMs and use your abilities!
The sun is gone and it's dark outside. Night is here. Check your DMs if you have powers!
The streets are empty, it's officially Night time. Check your DMs to make a move.
Pitch black outside. Night-role players, your time to shine is waiting in your DMs.
night_timeout: ⏰ The sun is up. Wake up, you lazy bums! It's Morning...
⏰ The long night is finally over. The roosters are screaming...
⏰ The shadows are gone and morning light is here.
⏰ Dawn breaks. Night actions are officially locked.
day_announce: It's morning, time for the daily drama. Gather around to point fingers, lie, and argue.
A new day! The Herd gathers to gossip about last night and vote someone off the island.
Sunrise is here, and the tension is high. Let the voting games begin.
The bell rang. Time to expose secrets, cast suspicion, and yeet somebody out.
engine_player_fled: 🏃‍♂️ Overcome by the terrifying noises of the nocturnal hunt, {0} broke into a frantic sprint, fleeing the territory forever.
🏃‍♂️ Paranoia gripped {0}'s heart. Choosing exile over the constant fear of the predators, they vanished into the endless wild.
🏃‍♂️ {0} abandoned the safety of the Herd. The looming shadow of death was too much to bear, and they ran without ever looking back.
engine_player_replaced_bot: 🤖 {0} fell asleep on watch! The Herd hooked their brain up to an AI so they can keep playing.
🤖 {0} disconnected from reality. A slightly dumb but enthusiastic bot took over their body.
🤖 {0} was caught sleeping on the job! An auto-pilot chip was inserted into their skull to keep them moving.
engine_night_target_away: 🚪 You went to their house but they were out partying! Action failed.
🚪 You swung by their place but nobody was home! Action failed.
engine_night_target_away_result: Target was touching grass outside their home.
engine_night_steal_failed: 🦝 You dug through their stuff but found literally nothing of value. Steal failed!
🦝 The target was too sweaty and cautious. Steal attempt failed!
🦝 Your fingers found nothing but lint. The steal was a total flop.
🦝 You came up empty-handed, they had absolutely zero loot.
engine_night_raccoon_apex_death: 🦝 {0} sneaked into the shadows hoping to steal a new identity, but crept straight into an Apex den! The predators tore the thief to shreds.
🦝 Curiosity led the Sneaky Raccoon to the wrong resting place. {0} was ambushed by lions, their thieving paws silenced forever.
🦝 Attempting to steal from the apex predators was a fatal mistake. {0}'s remains were scattered around the lions' territory as a warning.
engine_night_raccoon_apex_death_dm: lurked in the darkness and violently mauled you as you tried to steal their role!
caught you snooping around their den and ended your thieving career with a fatal bite!
woke up during your heist and shredded you to pieces!
engine_night_steal_dm: 🦝 Operating with perfect stealth in the dead of night, you stole **{0}**'s essence. You have transformed into a **{1}**.
🦝 The shadows masked your cunning act. You successfully swiped **{0}**'s identity and are now a **{1}**.
🦝 A flawless nocturnal heist! You took **{0}**'s role. Embrace your new instincts as a **{1}**.
engine_night_stolen_dm: 🦝 A shadow slipped past you in your sleep. The Sneaky Raccoon has stolen your essence! You have been diminished to a **{0}**.
🦝 You awake with a profound sense of loss. Your identity was pilfered in the night, leaving you as a mere **{0}**.
🦝 The Raccoon struck silently. Your unique traits are gone, and you must now survive as a **{0}**.
engine_night_mongoose_kill: 🦡 {0} attempted to brainwash the Chunky Mongoose, but the sturdy beast retaliated with a ferocity unmatched, biting the hypnotist's head clean off!
🦡 The Serpent's gaze met the unyielding eyes of the Chunky Mongoose. The hypnotic spell shattered as {0} was brutally mauled to death.
🦡 {0}'s mind-control magic was completely useless against the Chunky Mongoose, who countered the trick with a fatal, bone-crushing attack.
engine_game_over: 🏆 Game Over baby! The winning squad is: {0}
role_desc_king_of_lions: You're the big boss of the Apex. Your job is to eat the Herd. Pick a victim to turn into shawarma every night.
role_desc_alpha_lion: You can bite someone every night to turn them into a Lion and grow the gang.
role_desc_apex_vulture: You can investigate players at night to find out their roles and snitch to your pride.
role_desc_wise_owl: Every night, you investigate one player to find out their true colors.
role_desc_fledgling_owl: You can compare two players at night to see if they're in the same squad.
role_desc_rabbit_witch: You have two potions: one to heal a victim, and one to poison someone who annoys you.
role_desc_rhino_hunter: If you get killed, you drag your attacker to the grave with you. Never die alone!
role_desc_common_sheep: You have literally zero powers, but your daytime vote is super important so you don't all die.
role_desc_playing_possum: Your only goal is to troll the Herd into voting you out so you can win and laugh at them.
role_desc_hypnotic_serpent: You can hypnotize players at night. Once brainwashed, they become your slaves and kill for you.
role_desc_venomous_snake: You can poison a player. They will die in two nights if they don't find a cure.
role_desc_ghostly_dog: Even when you're dead, you can protect one player from attacks. What a bro.
role_desc_crazy_chemist_toad: You mess with chemicals at night. You might poison your target, or just blow yourself up by mistake!
role_desc_cursed_sheep: If the Lions attack you, you won't die, you'll just turn into a Lion instead.
role_desc_disguised_lion: You look like an innocent sheep to investigators, but at night you murder for the Apex pride.
night_no_action: 🌙 It's quiet tonight. Go back to sleep.
night_witch_choose: What are you doing with your potions tonight?
night_fledgling_choose_second: Now pick the second player to compare:
night_rhino_choose: Pick who you'll drag to the grave if you get attacked:
night_on_cooldown: ⏳ Your ability is on cooldown. Chill out tonight.
game_over_announce: 🏆 Game Over! The winning squad is: **{0}**!

role_desc_sneaky_raccoon: At night, steal someone's role and take it for yourself. If Full Thief mode is OFF, they become a Common Sheep. If ON, you get a 50% chance each night, and they become the new Thief!

settings_rules_title:
🎮 **Game Rules**

Tweak the core rules of the game:
role_desc_quilled_porcupine: You have 2 bullets. During the Day discussion, you can pull out the glock and instantly delete any player in broad daylight. Aim well!
engine_night_gunner_retaliate: 💥 The Apex tried to jump {0} at night... but {0} was strapped and blasted {1} in self-defense!
engine_draw_solo_death: 💀 Left all alone with zero purpose, {0} just faded out of existence...
role_desc_roaring_hippopotamus: You start undercover like a normie. Anytime during the day, you can reveal yourself. Once you do, your vote is permanently worth two votes!
mayor_reveal_prompt: 🎖 **Day Phase:** You are the Hippopotamus (Mayor). You can reveal yourself now so your vote counts double for the rest of the game.
mayor_reveal_success: ✅ You flexed on everyone and revealed yourself! Your vote now counts double.
mayor_reveal_announce: 📢 **The Roaring Hippopotamus** {0} has loudly exposed themselves! Their vote now counts double.
mayor_reveal_error: Yeah no, you can't do that right now.
role_desc_peaceful_manatee: Once per game, during the day, you can veto the lynch completely. Nobody gets kicked out today. Doing this will expose your identity to everyone.
pacifist_prompt: ☮️ **Day Phase:** You are the Peaceful Manatee (Pacifist). You can veto today's lynch. You only get one shot at this, and it reveals your identity.
pacifist_success: ✅ You cancelled today's lynch! Everyone knows who you are now.
pacifist_announce: ☮️ **{0}** stepped in and gave an emotional speech about peace. The village cried and decided not to yeet anyone today. {0} is the **Peaceful Manatee**!
pacifist_no_lynch: ☮️ The Manatee spoke. Nobody is getting kicked today.
pacifist_error: Stop clicking, you can't do that.
ability_type_protect: Protect (Be a bro and save someone)
ability_type_comparefactions: Compare (Check if two people are besties)
ability_type_retaliatekill: Retaliate (Take your killer down with you)
ability_type_selfwinonlynch: Self-Win (Troll them into voting you out)
ability_type_infect: Infect (Turn a normie into a predator)
ability_type_dominate: Dominate (Brainwash someone to do your dirty work)
ability_type_delayedpoison: Poison (They die from lag two days later)
ability_type_ghostlyprotect: Ghost Protect (Save someone from beyond the grave)
ability_type_chemistgamble: Gamble (RNG poison on them or yourself)
ability_type_dayshoot: Day Shoot (Pull up on someone in broad daylight)
ability_type_mayorreveal: Flex (Expose yourself for double vote power)
role_desc_lone_jaguar: You are a solo tryhard. Every night, pick someone to delete. You win if you're the last one alive. Apex can't kill you—you kill them instead. You also can't be infected.
engine_night_sk_reverse_kill: 🐆 Someone tried to jump the Lone Jaguar... but the Jaguar pulled the Uno Reverse card and deleted them instead!
engine_night_sk_kill: 🐆 The Lone Jaguar racked up another elimination tonight.
engine_night_chemist_gamble_sk: 🧪 A Chemist tried to force the Jaguar to drink some spicy water, but got stabbed before they could even finish their sentence!
engine_sk_overpower: 🐆 Only {0} (Lone Jaguar) and {1} remain... The Jaguar clapped their final opponent and takes the Victory Royale!
engine_draw_sk_hunter: 💥 Only {0} (Lone Jaguar) and {1} (Hunter) remain... They traded blows and both died. It's a draw, nobody wins!
role_desc_two_faced_jackal:
Two-Faced Jackal 🖕

You start as a basic Herd member and win with them... UNLESS all the Apex die. If the predators get wiped out, your villain arc begins! You transform into a King of Lions and join the predators to get revenge.

Strategy: Hide in plain sight, but secretly protect the Apex so they don't die out.
engine_traitor_transforms: 🦁 The last true predators fell, but the savannah is never safe. Unveiling a long-hidden darkness, {0} shed their gentle disguise, transforming into a terrifying King of Lions to exact revenge!
🦁 With the Apex wiped out, a dormant evil awoke within the Herd. {0} roared at the moon, revealing their true nature as a Lion, ready to butcher those they once called friends.
🦁 The death of the Lions was the catalyst. {0}'s treacherous heart consumed them, turning them into a vicious Apex predator, thirsty for Herd blood.
dm_traitor_transforms: 🦁 All the Apex are dead... Your villain arc begins! You are now a King of Lions! Go get revenge and clap the Herd!
dm_traitor_intro: You are the Two-Faced Jackal. Pretend to be a normie and vote with them. But if the Apex get wiped out, you instantly turn into one of them. Keep the predators alive!
role_desc_matchmaking_dove:
You are the Matchmaking Dove! 🕊️

On Night 1, pick two players to become Lovers. Their lives are now tied together. If one dies, the other literally dies of a broken heart instantly!

The Lovers ONLY win if they're the last two players alive, betraying their original squads. Choose wisely, you can even pick yourself!
dm_dove_intro: You are the Matchmaking Dove. Tonight, pick two players to ship together. Choose carefully, their lives are now tied!
dm_dove_lover_notify: 💕 You are now dating {0}! Your lives are tied. If they die, you die of grief immediately. You two only win if you are the last players standing, betraying your original teams!
engine_dove_linked: 🕊️ You successfully shipped {0} and {1}. They are officially Lovers now!
engine_dove_linked_public: 🕊️ Somewhere in the dark, two players just started dating...
engine_lover_died: 💔 {0} couldn't handle the heartbreak of losing their boo, and died of a broken heart on the spot!
dm_lover_died: 💔 Your lover died! The heartbreak is too much... You instantly perish.
engine_lovers_win: 💕 Against all odds, {0} and {1} survived! The power of love wins! The Lovers take the W!
role_desc_blindfolded_kangaroo: Once per game during the day, you can throw dirt in the eyes of a random Apex member. Their night targets will be completely encrypted!

dm_killed_serpent_investigate: gave you a heart attack when you investigated them!
dm_killed_retaliate_action: dragged you to the grave for attacking them!
dm_killed_jk_reverse: pulled an Uno Reverse and clapped you when you attacked!
dm_killed_jk_reverse_infect: pulled an Uno Reverse and clapped you when you tried to infect them!
dm_killed_porcupine_action: pulled out the glock and shot you!
dm_killed_threw_potion: chucked a toxic potion at your face!

start_helper_roles_title: Here are all the roles you can ruin friendships with:
